Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Ziel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel is a horned boy from the Wasteland known to wait on the sidelines for an advantage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel is known as Ziel of the Wasteland.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel is under the Beast King's protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel is of the Wasteland.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel's body is ravaged by a venomous, toxic green energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel has green horns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel has a long, white beard.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel is an expert in revising Foundation theory.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel is a man with emerald horns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel uses a hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel uses an Enforcer technique to handle his hammer's weight.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 8''' — Ziel spoke of pills that could advance a person to the peak of Truegold in minutes.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is a young-looking but haggard man in a tattered gray cloak with green horns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel was previously considered a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel's spirit is damaged.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — Lindon suspects Ziel was once at least an Overlord or an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel is a former genius of the Iceflower continent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel was mutilated by the leader of the Stormcaller cult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel was an Underlord in the last Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel's body was ravaged by poison.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel is a chosen of the Wastelands.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel is a member of the Dawnwing Sect and a chosen of Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel is an opponent in the tournament who wears a gray cloak and carries a massive two-handed warhammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel has short green horns that glow faintly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel practices a variation of the Path of the Dawn Oath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel is a Soulsmith and skilled scriptor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel's spiritual pressure is more like a Truegold than an Underlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel represents Northstrider in the Uncrowned tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel stands in front of Northstrider's audience.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel would receive a Broken Crown the red of blood madra as Northstrider's representative.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — Eithan can funnel advancement resources to Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel had given up on himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel is a combatant in the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel uses the Enforcer technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel uses the Forging technique to create circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel has an oath to House Arelius for life.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 16''' — Ziel was eliminated from the matches.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel is a mystery and once had a brief rampage against Brother Aekin before succumbing to spiritual injury.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel owns a cloud fortress next to Lindon's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel stood next to Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel is a character who can fall asleep instantly by a pond.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel was recruited by Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel linked his cloud fortress to Lindon's as they approached.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel is a character who questions if Remnants form in the Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel is a former Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel pushed over a tree with one hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel shook his head in response to Eithan's declaration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 8''' — Ziel is the only one whose power Lindon did not borrow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Ziel believes anywhere is better than here.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Ziel was assigned to the Kazan clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is a chosen of Northstrider.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is an Uncrowned of the Uncrowned King tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is the former leader of the Dawnwing Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel represents the Akura clan and the Sage of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel's spirit is currently restricted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel's strength is currently reduced to that of a Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is a character who mentions that a Dreadgod can eat entire mountains.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel is visiting other clans in person to assist with the evacuation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel is too far away to escape in time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel may have brought the Kazan clan members to the area.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Lindon is unsure of Ziel's status.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 16''' — Ziel is a person Lindon and Yerin have been looking for.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel reached the base of Mount Samara with the Kazan clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel is a character who felt fear after a state of unnatural focus passed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel was not present on the cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel used a Thousand-Mile Cloud to travel south.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Ziel is recovering from spiritual wounds using the benefits of the Pure Storm Baptism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Eithan performed the Baptism on Ziel using soulfire.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Ziel has an unnamed cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 2''' — Ziel is recovering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel is a person whose spirit has been uncomfortable for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel has undergone the Pure Storm Baptism.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel is recovering from the suppression field around Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel fought a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel lives in a house aboard his cloud fortress.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel uses a void key to store belongings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel's cloud fortress has foundational scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel added an encryption circle around his cloudbase.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel uses protective scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel has a long-dry heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel is sought out by the Sect of Twin Stars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel holds the title 'Master of the Training Hall'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Ziel is one of the people who entered Lindon's room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 9''' — Ziel is a character that needs to be caught.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel possesses a void key and a massive steel hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel hopped up on discs of Forged runes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel identified the presence of death aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel's body shines emerald when he uses his hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel is present in the labyrinth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel can scrape runes into blood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel conjured a force barrier and used a hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel was covered in dark spots on his gray cloak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel's body is thrice-forged in soulfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel is using scripts to seal a tunnel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel suggests using Ruler techniques to deal with the death madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Ziel uses a hammer driven by Forged script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 16''' — Ziel matched against Lindon's trident.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel was weakly moving against a wall with half his body burned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel lost consciousness and has burns across the left half of his body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon attempted to pick up Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel appeared burned.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel looked down on the trench.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel snored in the hallway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel asks what Lindon will name the hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel uses the Steel Dragon’s Mountain technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel uses emerald runes in his techniques.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel is not yet a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel's Path involves permutations of a single Forger technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Ziel wears a gray cloak and can fly through the air.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Ziel was present with Lindon, Eithan, Yerin, Orthos, and Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 25''' — Ziel shrugged regarding the possibility of a Monarch making people swear to keep their mouths shut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Ziel was kicking a mound of dirt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 26''' — Ziel asked Eithan how to get to Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Ziel is a character who questions Eithan's reporting requirements to the Abidan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 27''' — Ziel stated that they have stared into the abyss and lived to tell the tale.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Ziel is nearby Windfall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — A buried elixir exists that would increase advancement for anyone on a force Path, perfect for Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel is able to examine images from different sides.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Ziel holds his hammer upside-down.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel suggested that Lindon could go get Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel was an Archlord for years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel's father was a scriptor and an advanced sacred artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel bonded his father's Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel was the Archlord of the Dawnwing Sect.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel is a companion of Lindon and Orthos.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel is a character who sat on a nearby rock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel's hammer and shield are kept in a void key.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel used spiritual perception to extend down into the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel works with Orthos to move debris in a castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is an Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 10''' — Ziel is a character who uses a hammer and green sigils.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel uses a massive silver shield and a hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel uses emerald scripts to surround his limbs and weapons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel possesses a spirit that can sense danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel can Forge scripts to launch himself or manipulate momentum.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel's madra is relatively weak compared to the Rune Queen's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel's Path is similar to the Rune Queen's.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel is associated with a huge blocky hammer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel fled down a dark hallway.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel is slumped against wreckage in Shatterspine Castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel is buried under the wreckage of Shatterspine Castle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel is observing the Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Ziel has a spirit that Lindon can feel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 23''' — Ziel is assisting Lindon by providing instructions on the operation of an ancient script.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Ziel entered the pocket world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Ziel has green horns and can peek through the Soulforge portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 2''' — Ziel has begun to resonate with an Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Ziel is a member of Lindon's group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 3''' — Lindon is concerned that Ziel may only be following him because he and Yerin want her to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 4''' — Ziel was seated in a cycling position in front of the Paths of Heaven.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel operated the Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel is pushing toward peak Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 7''' — Ziel is being prepared by Lindon to take hits from Monarchs and Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel laid scripts in the sparring hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel steers a Grand Oath Array.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel is a character who knows of a Monarch who invented a specific technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel used his madra to intercept stray lightning bolts for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel uses silver runes to form a protective bubble.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel had not yet completed his Sage insight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel had spoken to Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel possesses Archlord treasures.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel can use silver and green runes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel is at the peak of his realm and close to Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel can forge runes in a circle around himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel is a defeated foe of the Sage of Calling Storms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel uses the Stone Anchor and force madra to hold himself together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel possesses an Archlord revelation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel can create a massive steel shield across the sky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Ziel's core was entirely empty during the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Ziel is fighting in a battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Ziel is a newly advanced Sage with unstable authority and an empty or near-empty core.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Ziel watched Yerin kill the Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel had left Lindon's group a week prior.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Ziel escaped by cutting through the Way.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel has a Grand Oath Array stowed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel is newly awakened to the Shield Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Ziel consumes a recovery elixir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel is on his way to the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel is battling through a hostile storm and lightning-dragons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel used a large steel shield for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel is the Shield Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel's Path is suited for defense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel used the Path of the Dawn Oath to spin emerald runes into circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel used the Enforcer technique Stone Anchor to keep his feet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel feels a furious will from the Dreadgod and from himself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel unleashed techniques to block the Weeping Dragon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel was hovering in the sky hurling techniques into the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel used the Oracle Sage’s blessing to watch the battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel can forge rings of emerald runes using a script.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — Ziel felt an arrow crawl to a stop in one of his script-circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Malice shifted her attention to Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Ziel was in the worst shape among Lindon's friends.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Ziel's wounds were a combination of Mercy's and Yerin's wounds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Ziel had woken up and was waiting for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Ziel burned with passion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Ziel's Broken Crown could theoretically be used to create a link.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 25''' — Ziel is a person Lindon needs to contact.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Ziel is focused on his spiritual sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Ziel is responsible for reinforcing rooms with scripts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — Ziel watched Mercy with a flat look.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Ziel seemed all right during the fight against shadow swords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Ziel provided a shield for Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Ziel can stabilize Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Ziel is a young Sage with emerald horns and shaggy hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Emriss suggests Yerin go help Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel is attempting to advance to Herald.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel's Remnant is a jade creature with the head of a snarling monster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel's Remnant has dull green horns and four-fingered hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel's Remnant is covered in scars from being taken apart and stitched together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel's Remnant radiates the physical pressure of a force Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel uses a hammer stored in his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel uses the Oathsign technique to Forge rings.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel's body has been strengthened by elixirs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel's skin was covered in scars from the Remnant's fingers that were filled with a dull jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — Ziel possesses the power of a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Ziel was a Truegold in Ghostwater.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Ziel can forge a circle to focus vital aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — Ziel used techniques that fell like hundreds of hammers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Ziel refused to go into the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Ziel is present and speaks with a flat voice.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Ziel asks if Eithan can help Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Ziel is a person whom students in the Training Hall ask about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Ziel is a character who can transport himself inside vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 36''' — Ziel has black, armored boots.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Ziel was present during Lindon's reunion.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel is chosen to solve crises with long-term solutions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 6''' — Ziel is mentioned as someone who would have protected people while doing what was wanted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel is a member of the Reaper Division.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel has horns that he can withdraw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel is traveling with a cover identity provided for his mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel is a character who can use illusions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel has a limited amount of madra relative to his full power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel is a character who carries people on his shoulder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel is a person who has experienced the agony of a ravaged spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel knows that Eternity Incorporated's attempts at transcendence will tear the world apart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel scavenged a piece of technology from local garbage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel uses a makeshift shield.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel has some authority as a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel uses the Path of the Dawn Oath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel uses a veil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — Ziel uses runes and script-circles to channel force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel is returning home from a mission.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel was covered in greenish blood from a split worm in the Void.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 12''' — Ziel stated that Iteration names are determined by a committee of Ghosts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin performed Ziel work to prevent people from believing she was a spider goddess.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
